title: Docplexus Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Docplexus Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Docplexus Digital Technologies family as a Full Stack Developer in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Docplexus Digital Technologies:
Docplexus Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus Digital Technologies!
